title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Atul Projects

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Atul Projects
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
